name: G-5 aggregator: unknown flags in --root mode are rejected with a clear error and exit 2
command: mkdir -p tree && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/runner.sh" --root "$PWD/tree" --nonsense-flag 2>err.txt; rc=$?; [ "$rc" -eq 2 ] && grep -q 'aggregator: unknown flag' err.txt && echo strict_flags 1>&2
